## [09:11 - 09:37]

who you're, what kind of ads they're running and things like that as well. So there's so much you can get from the page itself. And it's just worth spending that time to dive into the page, the associated groups, the page recommendations when you like it, what kind of friends that are associated with it. And again, there's just a wealth of information that you can develop about your avatar to start thinking about who you can target as well.
